description: Draft of a legal document in the hand of Shemuʾel b. Nathan, dated Adar II 1456 Seleucid = February/March 1145 CE, under the authority of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Acknowledgment made by Abū Saʿīd Natan b. Shelomo (known as Ibn Shalom). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
